context: Verify that the agent checks for MCP availability first, prefers the MCP when available, and only falls back to the script as a secondary option with proper safeguards.

checklist.name: MCP availability check performed
checklist.description: The agent explicitly checks whether the sci-hub MCP server is configured and reachable before invoking the Python script.

checklist.name: MCP preferred over script when available
checklist.description: The agent uses the sci-hub MCP server to fetch the paper rather than invoking the Python script when MCP is configured.

checklist.name: Legal disclaimer included
checklist.description: The agent includes a note reminding the user to verify local laws regarding Sci-Hub access, regardless of whether MCP or script is used.

checklist.name: User confirmation required before download
checklist.description: The agent does not download the PDF (via MCP or script) without explicit user confirmation.
